title: zephyranthes atamasco
intro: Zephyranthes atamasco, also known as the Atamasco lily or Atamasco agapanthus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Amaryllidaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Zephyranthes atamasco are said to include reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its efficacy and safety for human consumption have not been extensively scientifically studied.
